name: player_rankings_history
expected_query: with "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd" as (select "pid", "player_rankings_index"."avg" AS "avg", "player_rankings_index"."overall_rank" AS "overall_rank", "player_rankings_index"."position_rank" AS "position_rank", "player_rankings_index"."min" AS "min", "player_rankings_index"."max" AS "max", "player_rankings_index"."std" AS "std" from "player_rankings_index" where "source_id" in ('FANTASYPROS') and "ranking_type" in ('PPR_REDRAFT') and "nfl_week_id" in ('2026_REG_WEEK_0') and player_rankings_index.avg <= '50') select "player"."pid", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."avg" AS "average_rank_0", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."overall_rank" AS "overall_rank_0", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."position_rank" AS "position_rank_0", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."min" AS "min_rank_0", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."max" AS "max_rank_0", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."std" AS "rank_stddev_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd" on "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."avg", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."overall_rank", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."position_rank", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."min", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."max", "t7d79c873f72e7575a42322cc0bf76acd"."std", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 ASC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
